intro.p1: The v4 cohort is the only group whose profile has a
intro.p2: historical expectancy. The extreme zones below are research material (negative expectancy) — not buy candidates. The screener never says "buy": it says where to look first, and why.
gloss.beta: Sensitivity of the stock to the market, measured over its last 6 months: beta 1.6 = when the small caps index moves −1%, this stock moves −1.6% on average.
gloss.ruleDil: "Dilution" rule: no share-issuance preparation filing (S-1/S-3/424B) with the SEC in the last 180 days. A pending issuance crushes the price when it lands — the only official signal that clearly leans toward a crash (2.1×).
gloss.phenix: "Phoenix" profile: a massacred stock (far from its yearly high), compressed volatility, first signs of stabilization. This is where the explosions live (up to 4.6× the average)… and even more the crashes (2.3×): expectancy −11%, reserved for human research. Validation A (protocol v2 §6): FAILED.
gloss.fusee: "Rocket" profile: extreme momentum + volume explosion — the stock already on fire. Measured verdict: no edge (it doubles as often as a random stock, 1.03×) and expectancy −9.6%. Shown for information only, with no claim attached.
gloss.goingConcern: "Going concern": in their official report, the auditors write that they doubt the company will survive 12 months. Counter-intuitive but measured: multiplies by 4-5 the odds of doubling AND of collapsing — a "big move imminent" signal, without direction.
gloss.dilution: The company filed a document with the SEC preparing an issuance of new shares: your stake will be mechanically reduced and the arrival of the shares crushes the price. The only clearly unfavorable flag: 2.1× more frequent before a crash.
gloss.prelist: Stocks that pass the per-stock rules (price, drop) but are waiting for the market condition. Dilution is NOT yet checked (it will be the day they qualify).
research.badge: Statistical research — forward validation in progress
proto.signed: protocol {v} signed — archived outside the repo
v4.section.title: Today's v4 cohort
v4.emptyInfo: The absence of a cohort is information, not a malfunction: the method only buys during general sell-offs.
v4.disclaimer: Historical figures 2021-2026, survivors only, thresholds picked after the fact — a ceiling of hope, not a promise. Judgement by real data: summer 2027. Not investment advice.
v4.buy.title: Before any purchase
v4.buy.body: : read the recent 8-Ks (the catalyst is in the news, not in our figures) · check the bid/ask spread (if it is 3%, you need +3% just to break even) · size the position to survive −50%.
v5.section.title: v5 cohort — {w} d window
v5.emptyInfo: Try another window with the selector at the top — short windows see the flash purges the long one misses (and vice versa).
v5.prelist: Pre-list (waiting for a bearish market over {w} d)
v5.disclaimer: Figures 2021-2026 ({n} cases), survivors only, thresholds picked after the fact, and most of the signal comes from 2-3 purges — even less solid than v4. Judgement: real data only. Not investment advice.
v5.first: the most crushed of the day
v5.buy.body: : read the recent 8-Ks · check the bid/ask spread · size the position to survive −50% (the measured "0%" crash rate is a sample artifact).
v5.tracking: Validation D tracking ({n} rows, all windows)
tracking.title: Past cohorts tracking
tracking.subtitle: position vs historical trajectories — information, never a sell order
tracking.empty: No cohort recorded yet — waiting for the first bearish market. The journal started on July 6, 2026; each daily scan records its cohort (empty or not).
zones.title: 🔥🚀 Extreme zones — to study, not to buy
zones.tip: These profiles concentrate the explosions (up to 4.6× the average) but ALSO the crashes, and their measured expectancy is negative (−9 to −11%). This is not a buy list: it is the list of files where human research (news, refinancing, clinical trials) can make the difference our figures cannot.
zones.badge: measured negative expectancy — file reading required
zones.empty.scanning: Scan in progress... try again in a few moments
profile.fusee.label: Rocket
profile.phenix.label: Phoenix
analyze.error: Error during analysis. Check your connection.
analyze.profile.phenix: Phoenix (massacred stock stabilizing — a zone of explosions AND crashes)
footer.removed.title: Removed from the interface
footer.removed.body: : the 0-10 grade (v1 score — refuted by its own study: ten negative deciles) · P(+100%) by model (v3 — terminal verdict, never deployed) · breakout alerts (measured non-predictive trigger, 1.0×) — replaced by the "new v4 cohort entry" alert.
footer.trace.title: Traceability
footer.trace.body: : every figure displayed is served by the API from the frozen tables of the signed protocols (v4/v5, archived outside the repo; v2 for the profiles) — nothing invented, nothing recomputed live. All terms:
